all|all.text: I'm not going to repeat what he said, but UFC fighter Hokit is a despicable piece of shit. The sponsors, Monster energy drink, Bud Lite, Dodge Ram, and Jose Cuervo have not said a word. I say boycott them.
Brought to you in collaboration with Mountain Dew.

waitress: could i get you anything to drink?
me: yeah uhhhh can i get the noncon pepsi
Getting over art block 2nd time - Pepsi
My man looks like the sommelier at a restaurant that only serves Mountain Dew

Dr Pepper about to introduce a 24th flavour~

Daddy Dr.Pepper

❤️💬🔁 Appreciated!!!

Pls read my blog which contains the words: "Four men in camo waders are in the pool. Water, the color of fresh Mountain Dew, laps at their thighs as they dredge the bottom with poles like cranberry farmers on a faraway radioactive planet."
And of course this comes from Red Steeze, the Mountain Dew XXXtreme of political commentators.
I swear, some of you on here are just as ridiculous as the people on Threads demanding that Pepsi apologize to them because they misread a post.
Threads is fascinating. Truly. There are thousands of people raging about this girlboss/wild child post from Pepsi.

I'm not going to repeat what he said, but UFC fighter Hokit is a despicable piece of shit. The sponsors, Monster energy drink, Bud Lite, Dodge Ram, and Jose Cuervo have not said a word. I say boycott them.

A lot of this administration's decision making comes down to the fact that some of the worst dudes you know are still mad about that one time their mom wouldn't let them have mountain dew for breakfast. 
(the rest of it is eugenics, christofacism, and white supremacy)

Pepsi Heavy - This might look like a shitpost, but "heavy sodas" are real.

Soda fountains have adjustable syrup ratios. The industry standard is usually about a 5:1 ratio of water to syrup.

Heavy sodas use a higher syrup ratio like 3:1 for about a 66% calorie increase and a thicker, sweeter drink.

sugar|all.text:
Men: I cut out sugar and have lost 45 pounds

Women: I cut out sugar, caffeine, sitting down, I ran 300 miles and did 150 miles on my bike, I did 4 hours of yoga and 5 hours of strength training and I've lost 1/2 a pound.

I juiced two limes and the three tiny oranges I got in my grocery gacha, added sugar and some water, and tequila :D made two servings of premix more or less margarita! 

Oh shoot I have cointreau too 🏃‍♀️

This is an old photo of Cat Hedlund and Original Sugar Free Rockstar before they ruined it.

#photography #ItTastedLikeRobitussinAndDreams
His wife has them both on some low carb low sugar diet but Bob drinks wine and likes pastries

Cherry Coke zero is delicious. It's a marvel. I get the cans and I don't even drink a whole can. I'll drink half the can maybe or a few sips. I just like the burn in the throat. But the fact that it's no sugar and no calories and it's so delicious. We really did good things with that one.
this is what a diet of microplastics and sugar free monster on the male body

Wanna see something neat? I decided to cut out sugar at the end of last month. I'd been eating way too much sweet stuff since xmas & even though my weight hadn't really changed, I noticed my resting heart rate was quite high. 

Look at this difference! It's fallen loads since I reduced my intake.

Most store-bought marinara is bad for a bunch of reasons, but chief amongst them is that they have too much sugar and not enough oil. Marinara should have “wait, are you sure?” amounts of olive oil and sugar, in opposite directions.

There is no sugar-coating that the US men's soccer team is now hopelessly entwined with US political corruption, and no win will be seen as legitimate.

The entitlement of these assholes fuck everything up.

(belated) day 13: fast forward

a man might grow old(er) but his passion for indulging in a silly little drink with way too much sugar persists🧋

#junelezen2026 | #gposers | #elezen | #vergagpose
And full of nutrients!  My sil just did a sugar challenge. And she counted fruit! I’m like no. Added sugar is the enemy. For fruit, eat in season. that’s natures bounty.

The Chocolate Chip option was somewhat of a cheat. By using nearly the exact same recipe as their regular cookie dough, but with fewer chocolate chips and added sugar, they reduced the overall fat content of each serving. They were a bit cakey and very sweet but otherwise not TOO different
Anyone wants to tell him that gluconeogenesis is what happens when you cut out sugar and carbs?

No Sugar Tonight/New Mother Nature - The Guess Who 
youtu.be/yMG-Mi9I0-k?...

Men: I cut out sugar and have lost 45 pounds

Women: I cut out sugar, caffeine, sitting down, I ran 300 miles and did 150 miles on my bike, I did 4 hours of yoga and 5 hours of strength training and I've lost 1/2 a pound.

Oh shoot I have cointreau too 🏃‍♀️

#photography #ItTastedLikeRobitussinAndDreams
His wife has them both on some low carb low sugar diet but Bob drinks wine and likes pastries

Cherry Coke zero is delicious. It's a marvel. I get the cans and I don't even drink a whole can. I'll drink half the can maybe or a few sips. I just like the burn in the throat. But the fact that it's no sugar and no calories and it's so delicious. We really did good things with that one.
this is what a diet of microplastics and sugar free monster on the male body

Wanna see something neat? I decided to cut out sugar at the end of last month. I'd been eating way too much sweet stuff since xmas & even though my weight hadn't really changed, I noticed my resting heart rate was quite high. 

Look at this difference! It's fallen loads since I reduced my intake.

Most store-bought marinara is bad for a bunch of reasons, but chief amongst them is that they have too much sugar and not enough oil. Marinara should have “wait, are you sure?” amounts of olive oil and sugar, in opposite directions.

There is no sugar-coating that the US men's soccer team is now hopelessly entwined with US political corruption, and no win will be seen as legitimate.

The entitlement of these assholes fuck everything up.

a man might grow old(er) but his passion for indulging in a silly little drink with way too much sugar persists🧋

The Chocolate Chip option was somewhat of a cheat. By using nearly the exact same recipe as their regular cookie dough, but with fewer chocolate chips and added sugar, they reduced the overall fat content of each serving. They were a bit cakey and very sweet but otherwise not TOO different
And full of nutrients!  My sil just did a sugar challenge. And she counted fruit! I’m like no. Added sugar is the enemy. For fruit, eat in season. that’s natures bounty.

alternatives|all.text:
Canada is the New York of North America🤡

"Fast as gas" charging.

Pull your EV up to the "pump." Plug in. Go into the "gas" station to buy a sparkling water and pack of gum. Come out, unplug, and drive off at 85% charge.

Fast as gas.

Some OC ideas sketched between wrapping up this last set of commissions

I wanted to name them Poppi since they're like a lollipop but it sounds to close to Pomni OTL

I need to draw Poppi and Corben more often

They’re probably my favorite couple I’ve ever made
local gas station saying i can get two hard seltzer tallboys for 8.50 and that they're normally 4.25 apiece. no shit, for real?
had one (1) prebiotic soda and three (3) vegan cookies last night and am having ass blowing issues today which I am not used to bc I have the best lower digestive system ever!!!!

the lads have made it three full years without realizing soda pop even exists but i think i will let them have a root beer float with homemade handchurned ice cream on the 4th and i think i'll even allow real sugar root beer since it feels very silly to dump ice cream into diet soda
I'm so hazbin pilled my coworker jokingly referred to seltzer water as "static water" and my first thought was "what Vox ship is that?"
his girlfriend is drinking sparkling water
immediately after posting this i realized there’s gotta be a guy out there who believes diet soda is a jewish plot

"The fair also offered normal drinks for $5 ... , but I figured that for an extra dollar, it would be worth it to know the taste of freedom. Screamin’ Freedom, specifically. This drink offers 'natural energy,' 'mental focus,' 'hydration,' 'zero sugar,' '200 MG caffeine,' and a picture of an eagle."

So, diagnosed with Type 2 diabetes in late April - a scary, lonely, and disappointing moment, 

but I’m going to reverse this  

Low carbs, high protein, zero sugar, zero alcohol, running, cycling, stationary bike (in my library!), lifting weights, Mounjaro jabs 

Getting fit, 14 pounds down so far

Guys, I’ve got something to tell you.
This weekend, we found out that Sir Poppi isn’t a knight – 

✨ she’s a lady knight! ✨
approximately 79% of the liquid my body is comprised of at any given moment is probably in the form of A&W zero sugar

Drew Poppi as a Digital Circus OC because I like having characters that look like they fit into settings when I'm thinking about ideas. 

Unexpected and well timed bonus is that Poppi also slots really well into Deltarune/Undertale in my mind.
Happiness is watching Nick At Nite reruns on VHS with the original commercials. A little song, a little dance, a little seltzer down your pants.

If you drink soda, switching to diet or zero sugar soda can help you lose a ton of weight. I used to have a REALLY bad soda addiction and I haven't had regular soda in almost 7 months. You will eventually forget what regular soda taste like.
